title: Warehouse Executive
description:
Duties/Responsibilities:

  • Generate Goods Receipt Note/Warehouse Receipts and Delivery Orders accordingly
  • Manages warehouse inventory and maintains database
  • Generate Goods Receipt Note/Warehouse Receipts and Delivery Orders and submit to billing department/operations department once completed
  • Perform inbound cargo checking and outbound cargo checking.
  • Ensure all cargoes are appropriately labelled for storage
  • Ensure all documents related to good receiving and goods releasing are kept in order in the database
  • Plan and coordinate with customer service teams to ensure timely operations (shipments clearance and delivery) execution.
  • To fulfil customer request and immediate resolve if complaint arise.
  • To ensures all inventory transaction are completed within the timeline and maintain stock accuracy.
  • To conduct inventory count and assist to verify stock discrepancies.
  • To ensures the security and accountability of materials and goods with inventory control.
  • To ensure filing of documents is completed on time and accurately.
  • Ensure functional activities integrate with organizational requirements for quality management, regulatory compliance, and customer needs.
  • To send out daily/weekly/monthly reports as per customer’s requirements
  • To support on billing reports when tasked
  • Performs other job related functions as and when required by superior.
  • Other ad-hoc tasks as assigned

Required Skills/Abilities:

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.
  • Ability to quickly learn company product codes and terminology.
  • Thorough understanding of warehouse policies and procedures.
  • Good analytical skills and ability to make sound judgments relative to inventory.
  • Proficient in MS. Officer, computer knowledge and operating scanning equipment;
  • Positive customer service skills with an ability to communicate eloquently and effectively;
  • Desire to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment and able to handle stressful conditions;
  • Able to work independently with minimum supervision, self-initiated.

Education and Experience:

  • Diploma or equivalent required.
  • At least two years of work experience in a warehouse required.

Physical Requirements:

  • Must be able to lift up to 15 pounds at times.
  • Ability to move around the warehouse.


Able to start work immediately will be an added advantage.

postedCompany.description:
HUB Distributors Services is a member of the Singapore Logistics Association since 1990. We are awarded the Total Defence Award in 1996, 1999, 2001, 2003 and 2005 for commendable contributions to National Defence. Subsequently, HUB Distributors Services was awarded the MDA (Minister for Defence Award) and included in the prestigious MIDAS league members in 2009.

In 2010, HUB Distributors was certified a partner of the Singapore customs under Secure Trade Partnership (STP) to pledge commitment to adopt and implement appropriate security measures to keep our supply chains secured. In 2013, HUB Distributors Services was awarded the Promising SME 500 and in 2014, the Singapore SME 1000.

 

HUB Distributors Services was incorporated in 1988 and has since grown from a humble beginning of 4 vehicles to a full-fledged logistics company in the supply chain industry. Backed by a dedicated and committed team, the company is confident of meeting all customers’ logistics and distribution needs.

From our roots in Singapore, we have widened our reach beyond our shores and place several agents in strategic cities across the globe such as Hong Kong, Shanghai, Shenzhen, Beijing, Jakarta, Tokyo, Seoul, Rotterdam, Hamburg, London, New York etc.

Mission:

To provide innovative and logistical solutions that will change the way you think about logistics

Vision:

At HUB, we aim to be the logistics company that offers the best user experience for every consumer
postedCompany.name: HUB DISTRIBUTORS SERVICES PTE LTD
